chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1101 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 14.05.2025 Mr. Hameedullah Khan, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------ Applicant/accused Ihsanullah son of Khursheed Hassan seeks pre-arrest bail in FIR No.683/2024, registered at P.S. Docks for offence under sections 324, 34, PPC, after rejection of his bail plea by learned Additional Sessions Judge- VII, Karachi West vide order dated 30.12.2024. Learned counsel for applicant at the very outset submits that the parties have settled their dispute outside the Court and complainant has recorded no objection for confirmation of pre-arrest bail of the applicant/accused. Mr. Tariq Khan, advocate, files Vakalatnama on behalf of complainant, it is taken on record. He endorsed the statement of learned counsel for applicant. Injured of this case, namely, Salahuddin is also present in Court and has recorded no objection for confirmation of pre-arrest bail of applicant. Learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh has also recorded no objection. In view of above, since the alleged offence is compoundable and the parties have settled their dispute outside the Court, therefore, interim pre-arrest bail granted to applicant by this Court vide order dated 05.05.2025 is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. Instant criminal bail application is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
